profile.name: Puheng Li (李朴恒)
bio_html: I'm a third-year PhD student in the Department of Statistics at Stanford University, where I'm fortunate to be advised by Prof. Emmanuel Candès and Prof. Renyuan Xu. My research interest lies broadly in leveraging statistical methods to guide modern machine learning and make them more interpretable, reliable, efficient and accurate with statistical guarantees.

Previously, I received my bachelor's degree in statistics from School of Mathematical Sciences at Peking University. I had the pleasure of working with Prof. Lei Wu, Prof. Weijie Su, Prof. Linjun Zhang, and Prof. James Zou during my undergraduate study. Please feel free to contact me if you are interested in my research!

education.institution: School of Mathematical Sciences, Peking University

experience.title: Quantitative Analyst Intern, The D. E. Shaw Group (Jun. 2026 - Sep. 2026)
Applied Scientist Intern, Amazon (Jun. 2025 - Sep. 2025)
items_html: Worked on LLMs for fraud detection and prevention.

experience.title: Research Scientist Intern, Machine Learning Group, Microsoft Research Asia (Mar. 2023 - Jun. 2023)
items_html: Worked on estimating the generalization error of score based diffusion models, under the supervision of Dr. Zhong Li, Dr. Huishuai Zhang, and Dr. Jiang Bian.

service_html: ICLR 2025, NeurIPS 2025 (Main Conference + GenAI in Finance Workshop) & 2026, CVPR 2026, ISIT 2026
honors: 2023 Stars of Tomorrow, Microsoft Research Asia
2023 Excellent Graduate (PKU & Beijing), equiv. to Summa Cum Laude
2018 Gold Medal at the 34th Chinese Mathematical Olympiad (CMO)
2017 Silver Medal at the 33rd Chinese Mathematical Olympiad (CMO)
miscellaneous_html: I love singing, especially solo and a cappella. I was honored one of the Top 10 Singers at Peking University.
Find some of my performances on my Bilibili!
I enjoy playing the guitar, chess, Go, table tennis, and pool. I also had fun providing voice-over for radio dramas and school promotional videos.

Try out a Gomoku Game with the robot I programmed in college!
